text: The primary function(s) of an automatic sprinkler system is(are) to:

options.text: A) Extinguish the fire which triggers it
B) Limit the spread of fire and control the amount of heat produced
C) Protect people in the areas which have sprinkler heads
D) Alert the crew to the fire

explanation: Automatic sprinkler systems are primarily designed for fire control. They limit the spread of fire by cooling the area and surrounding structure while keeping the fire intensity manageable until active firefighting intervention arrives.
